decisions.title: Split runtime governance into 4 executable plans after contract freeze
decisions.description: Os gaps foram divididos em Plan 0 (contracts/request context), Plan 1 (identity/rbac/abac/channel mapping), Plan 2 (supervisor-worker delegation + execution routing), Plan 3 (override source policy + trusted frontdoor). Plan 0 e pre-requisito; Plans 1/2/3 podem rodar em paralelo parcial consumindo os contratos congelados.
alternatives: Plano unico grande (mais risco de conflito em chat.ts e server-methods/types.ts)
Executar sem contract freeze (mais rapido no inicio, alto risco de redefinicoes e regressao)
